personal.name: Mourya J P
personal.title: Generative AI Full Stack Engineer
personal.tagline: Building autonomous AI systems and production-grade full-stack applications.
personal.bio: Generative AI engineer and full-stack developer specializing in LLM-powered applications, agent orchestration, and scalable web platforms. Experienced in building RAG systems, AI assistants, and end-to-end production deployments using modern web technologies.

experience.description: Developing production-grade AI systems and intelligent agent workflows for enterprise applications.
responsibilities: Building autonomous AI workflows using LangGraph
Implementing scalable AI-powered interfaces using Next.js
Integrating OpenAI and Claude models into production workflows
Optimizing MongoDB data pipelines for AI-driven applications
Maintaining CI/CD workflows using Azure DevOps

experience.description: Developed scalable full-stack client applications using MERN technologies.
responsibilities: Developed client-facing applications using React Native and Next.js
Implemented REST API integrations and backend services
Worked on Shopify integrations and custom applications
Collaborated on database design and API architecture

experience.description: Worked on AI-driven internal platforms and full-stack product development.
responsibilities: Contributed to Ratl.ai, an autonomous QA, DevOps, and TechOps AI agent platform
Developed scalable frontend features using Next.js
Worked with Git workflows and code review processes
Managed deployments using Azure DevOps pipelines

projects.name: HarmoniAI
projects.description: A retrieval-augmented AI chatbot designed to provide contextual mental health support using semantic search and conversational AI.
projects.problem: Generic chatbots lack contextual understanding and relevant knowledge retrieval for mental health assistance.
projects.solution: Built a RAG architecture combining vector retrieval and LLM reasoning to deliver contextual responses.

projects.name: ToxiTrace
projects.description: A machine learning system that predicts mental health conditions using both acoustic voice features and survey data.
projects.problem: Mental health analysis often relies on single-source inputs, reducing predictive accuracy.
projects.solution: Designed a multimodal pipeline combining acoustic voice analysis with PHQ-9 questionnaire evaluation.

projects.name: Developer Blogging Platform
projects.tagline: Full-stack blog platform built with Next.js
projects.description: A modern blogging platform enabling content creation and publishing with optimized performance.
